scripts.start: concurrently -n angular,electron -c blue,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n angular,electron -c blue,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:4208 && cd electron && npm run build && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:electron
scripts.package: npm run build && cd electron && npm run package
